mapper.insert: insert into stu_evaluation(student_id, course_id, question_id, score, semester_id, create_time) values (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{questionId}, #{score}, #{semesterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

insert into stu_evaluation(student_id, course_id, question_id, score, semester_id, create_time) values
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.score}, #{item.semesterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
ON CONFLICT (student_id, course_id, question_id) DO UPDATE SET score = EXCLUDED.score
mapper.select: select question_id from stu_evaluation where student_id = #{studentId} and course_id = #{courseId} and semester_id = #{semesterId}
mapper.delete: delete from stu_evaluation where semester_id = #{semesterId} and course_id in (select id from cou_course where teacher_id = #{teacherId} and del_flag = '0')
